label: Country borders (admin-0)
description: Sovereign country polygons. Default source: Natural Earth 110m (public domain) fetched on first request if local file absent.

label: Major airports (sample)
description: Sample hub airports for wiring; replace airports.geojson with OurAirports-derived data (ODbL if from OSM) or your own.
license: Sample coordinates: factual data; replace file with dataset license you choose.

label: Ports (sample)
description: Sample seaports; extend with WPI/Natural Earth ports under their terms.

label: Military installations (placeholder)
description: Empty FeatureCollection by default. Add GeoJSON from an openly licensed source (e.g. OSM-derived with ODbL attribution).
license: Add your dataset license in metadata when you populate military.geojson

label: Border crossings (placeholder)
description: Empty by default; populate with vetted open data.

label: Dams / energy / industrial (placeholder)
description: Empty by default; consider GEM, EIA, or OSM extracts with attribution.
